headings.rules: Use tracking-widest for main titles. Apply text-shadow to simulate torchlight glow. Do NOT use Inter or Roboto.

body.rules: Leading-relaxed for readability. Color should be parchment-white (#e0d3c1).

spacing_and_layout.scale: Tailwind standard with generous padding (p-6, p-8). Container max-w-7xl.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use asymmetrical layouts for the landing page. Avoid rigid symmetry.
spacing_and_layout.canvas_area: Fixed aspect ratio (e.g. 800x600). Must be wrapped in a container that looks like a rune-carved stone window.

components.buttons: Flat background with 1px solid border (#8c1c13). Hover state slightly lifts with a blood red text-shadow and border glow. No extreme rounded corners (use rounded-sm or rounded-none). Font: Cinzel uppercase.
components.cards: Dark surface (#161311) with subtle stone/noise texture overlay. 1px border (#31261d). Inside padding p-6. Do NOT use default Shadcn shadows.
components.modals: Background color of aged parchment (#e0d3c1) for game UI elements like 'Level Up', with dark text (#2a221b). Use inset shadow to mimic burnt edges. Or, if dark, use deep stone #161311.
components.canvas_frame: border-[4px] border-[#1a1614] rounded-none shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)] relative. Add pseudo-elements or absolute positioned spans in corners for 'runes'.

animations.menus: Fade in with a slight scale up (Framer Motion: initial opacity 0, scale 0.95).
animations.in_game_ui: Use simple CSS animations for HUD elements. Damage numbers float up and fade out. Screen shake on heavy hit.

images.description: Atmospheric black and white photo of an eerie abandoned stone cellar with barred windows.
images.usage: Landing page hero background, heavy dark overlay bg-black/80 to ensure text readability.

images.description: a piece of parchment paper with torn edges
images.usage: Use as a background-image with blend-mode for modals (Level-up, Pause menu) or About sections.

images.description: A mysterious wizard in black-and-white attire holding a wand.
Detailed view of a medieval knight's steel gauntlet grasping a sword.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a React app using plain JavaScript (.jsx/.js files), not TypeScript (.tsx/.ts).
Apply global styling for typography using 'Cinzel' for headers, 'MedievalSharp' for subheaders, and 'IM Fell English' for body text.
Do NOT use standard generic rounded cards. Stick to sharp edges, dark themes, border-collapse, or 1px subtle borders.
Implement JWT Auth forms using custom inputs to match the dark fantasy theme (remove rounded borders, use custom colors). Avoid default Shadcn look.
Game canvas should have image-rendering: pixelated in CSS to ensure the retro look remains sharp.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='play-guest-btn').
Use framer-motion for smooth UI transitions (e.g., Level Up modal popping in, menus fading).
